title: La fornarina
writer: Alberto Casella, Tullo Gramantieri, Giorgio Pastina
actors: Lída Baarová, Walter Lazzaro, Anneliese Uhlig
plot: Raffaello Sanzio falls in love with Margherita, a maiden of the people. He becomes her lover and lives with her, but their relationship ignites the jealousy of an aristocrat who secretly orders the kidnapping of the girl.
